subcodes.first_line: O beloved one! My breast was dilated upon perusing thy brief and lustrous missive, and I exclaimed: "How excellent is this man!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الحبیب قد انشرح صدری بمطالعه نمیقتک الوجیزه الغراء فقلت لله در الرجل
subcodes.subjects: @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement
